name: Go-Orca
description: Custom CRM and business software development. Agents can query leads, calculate CRM ROI, estimate build costs, and authenticate via anonymous or identity-assertion flows.

skills.name: CRM ROI Calculator
skills.description: Calculate the annual savings and ROI of switching from spreadsheets or off-the-shelf CRM to a custom Go-Orca CRM.
examples: What's the ROI of a custom CRM for a 15-person sales team spending 5 hours/week on manual data entry?
Calculate CRM payback period for $30k investment with $2k/month current tool spend

skills.name: Leads Pipeline API
skills.description: Read and update leads in the Go-Orca CRM pipeline. Requires authentication via /api/agent/auth.
examples: List all new leads from this week
Mark lead from Premier Fence as contacted

skills.name: Quote Request
skills.description: Submit a custom software project quote request on behalf of a user.
examples: Submit a quote request for a 10-person CRM with Stripe integration
